obstacle_groups.label: Upper-right corner — touches top and right edges
Left mid-staircase — touches left edge, y=6..10
Central blob — first obstacle in laser path at x=7 going down
Right mid-staircase — touches right edge, y=10..14
Lower-left corner — touches bottom and left edges

gates.note: above central blob — laser passes through going down; blocks upward return
left wall above left staircase — upward only along left edge
right wall below right staircase — downward only along right edge
